message:
✨ Improve mission import UX: auto-open sidebar with imported mission (#2849)

After importing a mission, the browser closed and the user was left on
the dashboard with no clear indication of what happened or what to do
next. The 4-second toast was easy to miss.

Now after import:
- Sidebar auto-opens and expands (not minimized)
- Imported mission is set as the active mission so it's highlighted
- Success banner shows the mission title with clear guidance to click
  "Run" or view the steps
- Banner stays until dismissed (not auto-dismissed after 4 seconds)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
